description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named s3fs-fuse CI that runs on every push, pull request, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has two jobs: Linux and macos10. The Linux job runs on multiple Linux containers, including Ubuntu, Debian, Rocky Linux, CentOS, Fedora, OpenSUSE, and Alpine, with a matrix strategy. For each container, it installs packages, checks out the source code, builds the project, runs cppcheck, shellcheck, and a test suite. The macos10 job is currently disabled due to compatibility issues.
